reasoning:
**Analysis of Existing Solutions:**
None yet provided - no structural approaches to avoid.

**Engaging with "limelike" as inspiration:**
Limestone forms through accretion - countless tiny marine organisms depositing calcium carbonate over eons. No single organism needs to be consistent; the structure emerges from aggregate activity. Lime also transforms organically (calcium oxide is caustic, reactive, turns soft things into hard permanent structure). What if retirement worked like geological sediment rather than a savings account?

```json
{
  "label": "Sedimentary Retirement",
  "design_principles": "Retirement forms from economic sediment, not savings decisions. Capture activity, not intent. Volatility accelerates hardening rather than threatening stability.",
  "core_mechanism": "Micro-deposits automatically accrue from ALL economic transactions (earning AND spending), forming layers that compound faster during income volatility.",
  "how_it_works": "Every transaction (payment received, purchase made) auto-sediments 0.2% to personal retirement stratum via payment processor integration. Layers 'harden' (earn higher interest) based on time AND income volatility in the deposit period—high-variance months produce denser strata. Withdrawal excavates oldest layers first. Early withdrawal only touches recent 'soft' deposits, creating natural disincentive. Implementation requires: mandate payment processor sediment capture, distributed ledger for layer tracking, volatility-weighted hardening algorithm, actuarial modeling of excavation rates.",
  "what_is_new": "Captures economic ACTIVITY not income. Spending deposits too. Volatility becomes an asset (accelerates hardening) rather than liability. No decisions required.",
  "why_it_works": "Gig workers often have MORE transactions than salaried workers despite lower income. This captures their true economic footprint. Volatility bonus compensates for uncertainty's psychological cost while creating genuine hedge: unstable income = faster-hardening retirement. Removes willpower from equation entirely.",
  "why_it_fails": "Transaction fees compound the sediment levy, burdening low-margin businesses. Cash transactions escape capture, incentivizing shadow economy. Hardening algorithm requires calibration—too generous on volatility rewards gaming (artificial income swings). 0.2% may be too small to matter, too large kills commerce.",
  "medium_term": "Payment processors become retirement infrastructure. 'Sediment statements' replace 401k summaries. Workers check strata thickness not account balances. Gig platforms compete on sediment passthrough rates.",
  "long_term_vision": "Retirement becomes geological—inevitable result of living economically, not financial discipline. Income volatility carries automatic compensation. The distinction between 'saving' and 'living' dissolves. Economic participation IS retirement preparation, regardless of consistency."
}
```

solution.label: Sedimentary Retirement
solution.design_principles: Retirement forms from economic sediment, not savings decisions. Capture activity, not intent. Volatility accelerates hardening rather than threatening stability.
solution.core_mechanism: Micro-deposits automatically accrue from ALL economic transactions (earning AND spending), forming layers that compound faster during income volatility.
solution.how_it_works: Every transaction (payment received, purchase made) auto-sediments 0.2% to personal retirement stratum via payment processor integration. Layers 'harden' (earn higher interest) based on time AND income volatility in the deposit period—high-variance months produce denser strata. Withdrawal excavates oldest layers first. Early withdrawal only touches recent 'soft' deposits, creating natural disincentive. Implementation requires: mandate payment processor sediment capture, distributed ledger for layer tracking, volatility-weighted hardening algorithm, actuarial modeling of excavation rates.
solution.what_is_new: Captures economic ACTIVITY not income. Spending deposits too. Volatility becomes an asset (accelerates hardening) rather than liability. No decisions required.
solution.why_it_works: Gig workers often have MORE transactions than salaried workers despite lower income. This captures their true economic footprint. Volatility bonus compensates for uncertainty's psychological cost while creating genuine hedge: unstable income = faster-hardening retirement. Removes willpower from equation entirely.
solution.why_it_fails: Transaction fees compound the sediment levy, burdening low-margin businesses. Cash transactions escape capture, incentivizing shadow economy. Hardening algorithm requires calibration—too generous on volatility rewards gaming (artificial income swings). 0.2% may be too small to matter, too large kills commerce.
solution.medium_term: Payment processors become retirement infrastructure. 'Sediment statements' replace 401k summaries. Workers check strata thickness not account balances. Gig platforms compete on sediment passthrough rates.
solution.long_term_vision: Retirement becomes geological—inevitable result of living economically, not financial discipline. Income volatility carries automatic compensation. The distinction between 'saving' and 'living' dissolves. Economic participation IS retirement preparation, regardless of consistency.
